content:
About Us Discovering outstanding musical talent and connecting them with world-class opportunities.
Our Vision The Washington Rachmaninoff Musicians Association was founded to discover outstanding musical talent and connect them with world-class opportunities.
As a nonprofit, non-charitable organization, we champion professionalism, discipline, and mentorship in shaping the next generation of classical musicians.
We believe music is both an art and a craft — one that requires passion, precision, and purpose.
WIRMC Competition Host the Washington International Rachmaninoff Music Competition — bringing together outstanding young performers on an international stage.
Education & Training Provide masterclasses, workshops, and performance programs to develop the next generation of classical musicians.
Global Connections Build bridges across the international music community, connecting talent with mentors and performance opportunities worldwide.
Meet the Team Founders & Leadership Tian Gang Co-Founder & Executive Director
Tian Gang leads the strategic development and operational execution of the Washington Rachmaninoff Musicians Association. With extensive experience in music event management and arts education, he oversees the organization's major initiatives and partnerships.
summary:

content:
Join Us Be part of our global musical network. Whether you're a musician, educator, or supporter — we welcome you.
Ways to Get Involved Become a Member Join our community of musicians, educators, and music enthusiasts from around the world.
Volunteer at WIRMC Help us organize world-class music competitions and make a direct impact on young musicians' careers.
Partner with Us Collaborate with us as an institution, organization, or individual to expand musical opportunities globally.
Sponsor a Prize Support the next generation of classical musicians by sponsoring a competition prize or educational program.
Contact Us Email: wirmc@hotmail.com

content:
WIRMC The Washington International Rachmaninoff Music Competition — a launching platform for the next generation of pianists.
Visit WIRMC Official Site About the Competition WIRMC is our flagship event — an annual piano competition that brings together gifted pianists from around the world. Inspired by the legacy of Sergei Rachmaninoff, the competition celebrates expressive depth, technical mastery, and bold interpretation.
Each year, we welcome a diverse panel of internationally acclaimed judges and offer participants:
Solo performance opportunities at prestigious venues Professional feedback and mentorship Access to a global community of peers and mentors Junior Division For young emerging talents beginning their journey in classical piano performance.
Youth Division Challenging repertoire for developing pianists ready to demonstrate their growing artistry.
Young Artist Division An advanced platform for pianists approaching professional-level performance.
Professional Division The highest tier — showcasing world-class technique, interpretation, and stage presence.
The 2025 Global Grand Final Held in New York City, USA
The Washington International Rachmaninoff Music Competition & Summer Camp Global Final was held successfully in 2025, bringing together outstanding young performers from across the globe in the world’s music capital.
Opening Ceremony Featured Performance Apply for WIRMC
